ValidationRule.description: User cannot change "Merge Pending" and "Deleted" statuses.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Merge Pending"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Merge Pending")), EDI_ByPassValidation__c = false), AND (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Deleted"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Deleted")), EDI_ByPassValidation__c = false) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: "Merge Pending" and "Deleted" statuses cannot be changed.
